hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md|html)$'; then prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then which ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
